title: Ubiquiti UniFi Etherlighting Patch Cable 0,15m, white, 24-pack
description: Nano-thin patch cable in category Cat6 with transparent connectors, packaged in sets of 24 units , is specially designed for use with switches from the UniFi Pro Max or Enterprise series. It supports PoE++ and speeds of up to 2.5 GbE . Thanks to its lighting effects, the cable interactively displays the status of Ethernet ports . The outer diameter of the cable is just 2.5mm, and its total length, including connectors, is 15cm. As is customary with UniFi solutions, the cable comes in an elegant… (24) Patch cables
